_note: Optional MCP integrations. To activate, move entries into .mcp.json mcpServers and set the required environment variables.

sentry._purpose: Pull full error context, breadcrumbs, affected users, and release info from Sentry events

linear._purpose: Auto-update incident tickets and link PRs to Linear issues

datadog._purpose: Pull production metrics as context before optimization and post benchmark results

slack._purpose: Notify the team of regressions, improvements, or CI escalations
